name_en: Association of Families of Flight PS752 Victims
description: Advocacy organisation established by families of the 176 victims of Ukraine International Airlines Flight 752, shot down by the IRGC Aerospace Force on 8 January 2020. The association campaigns for accountability, transparency, and justice through legal action and international advocacy. It has pursued cases in Canadian and international courts and has called for an independent international investigation into the shootdown.
editorial_notes: Co-founded by Hamed Esmaeilion, who served as president and spokesperson until his resignation on 7 March 2023. Based in Canada.
